product.name: 5-in-1 Pet Carrier with Backpack, Pet Carrier Stroller, Shoulder Strap, Carriers with Wheels for Dogs and Cats - Blue
features: CONVENIENT DESIGN - Pet travel system allows you to explore the world with your pets with convenient 5-in-1 design; Converts into shoulder carrier, dog backpack, pet car seat, dog stroller, or wheeled carrier
EASY TO CONTROL - Features easy-to-control 360-degree wheels with rear break and a parent tray with 2 cup holders; Also includes a removable pad, shoulder strap, and 1 safety tether

MADE FOR COMFORT - Equipped with telescoping handles for wheeled carrier, adjustable strap, a large side zipper pocket, a mesh window for air ventilation, and large openings for your pet to freely move
EASILY STORED - Stroller frame design folds with 1-handed mechanism into a small size and the carrier wheels fold flat for easy storage
DIMENSIONS - (L x W x H) 36.00 x 37.40 x 19.00 inches; Folded dimensions (L x W x H): 19 x 12 x 32.2 inches; Weight: 15.90 pounds; Recommended weight limit: 16 pounds
